2 New Game Reviews
2002'11'24 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, I have just added 2 brand new game reviews written by CrackBaby911. They are two awesome games with some great screenshots to let you see what the game is like. The reviews are very detailed, you can just imagine yourself playing them. So these games sound interesting, go and check out the reviews. The games reviewed were:

PS2: Way of the Samurai
GC: Super Smash Bros. Melee

Well check those out for now. I'll be back with more information later / MG Out...

Updates
2002'11'24 ++ posted by Draton
Hey everyone. I have some new updates for you guys that should make everyone happy. First off, a new project of mine has been added to the miscellaneous section, the meta tag generator. Head on over there to check it out, it's very useful. Next, MG has mentioned that he will bring new information very soon to DBGT, possibly some video game reviews. Be sure to check everything out that I mentioned. That's all for now everyone.

-lAtE

Miscellaneous Updates
2002'11'23 ++ posted by Draton
Sup' all? As MG mentioned, there is an html tester up that I made for all you webmasters. Check it out, it's pretty useful. I also just finished making a "meta-tag" generator for you webmasters, and that should be up soon. Until then, I'll be getting as much tutorials and other helpful things for you webmasters in the miscellaneous section. However, for me to create the right things, I need you webmasters to tell me exactly what you need help with. If it's worth making a tutorial for it, I'll do it, if not then I'll just see what I can do to help you. So if you need help with things, e-mail me about it, and I'll see if I can make a page for the miscellaneous section answering your questions. That's all for now.
-lAtE

HTML Tester
2002'11'23 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Another addition to the Miscellaneous section. This is a very helpful tool to help out webmasters. Its an html tester. You simply input the HTML you want, and click View HTML. Then it will show you how the page would have turned out. So you can make corrections or play around with it. A useful tool. Check it out by clicking here. / More to come later / HTML Tester / MG Out...

DBZ Budokai Information
2002'11'23 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, as the infamous release of DBZ Budokai for the PS2 nears, we here at DBGT have decided to slowly give you more info on how the game will work and different concepts so you can see what the game will be like before its release on December 4th. Here are some details on the game for now:

Genre: Fighting/Action
Players: 2 Players

FEATURES:
*Will have a story line from the Saiyan to the Cell Saga
*Face off with up to 23 mighty Dragon Ball Z warriors!
*Unlock, customize, and trade devastating skills with friends to create the most powerful fighters in the universe!
*Fight in 5 epic play modes
*Fine tune your skills against custom AI opponents
*Battle at blazing speeds in the Burst Zone

Thats it for now, more to come tommarrow / MG Out...


Gallery Updates
2002'11'21 ++ posted by JamJar
I have managed to sort out quite a bit with the image gallery in the last couple of days. I got the video clips working so you can now download them with no errors, more should soon be appearing. I am thinking of going ahead with my idea of a fan-art section soon, however I'm not sure weather it would be a good Idea to let any old people upload files, when I had done this in the past, alot of people uploaded hentai and ruined the atmosphere of the gallery. I might allow fan-art uploads through admin validation. Lastly I created some colouring pictures, which you can download and colour in. They can be found in the images part of the image gallery. Click here to view them. Hopefully you should see more updates there soon. As for the Episodes; they will be included in the main part of dbgt.com, we have lots of them already lined up for uploading. If you want you can send me some fan-art, depending on the quality of it, and how much I recieve, I will make my decision about the fanart section.


2002'11'21 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone. We have gotten two new affiliates. One two days ago, and one today. Both these sites are awesome with great information and multimedia to feast on. The two sites are Gojiita's Domain and DBZ Circuit. They are both experienced site set on bringing you the best dbzgt sources possible. So please go check'em out in your spare time. We all plan on helping each other and working on many projects together in the future. / Gojiita's Domain & DBZ Circuit / MG Out...

Some Updates
2002'11'20 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, the response for me needing a media host was great. I think I have one now, thx to all those apply, we thank you for your support. That means we will soon be getting full episodes, movies, and great video clips. Sorry I wasn't able to add anything today. There is lots to come, I assure you that. Until then, please help us by clicking the banner above this post. / MG Out...

Media Host Needed
2002'11'19 ++ posted by Majin Gohan
Hey everyone, we want DBGT to continue growing. But we simply don't have the space on our server. So we need your help. We need a really good media server. Not much space would be needed, but what we really need is ALOT of BANDWIDTH. Unlimited is preferred, since we will use alot. In return you will get some form of advertisement on DBGT. Not sure how, but we will negotiate it. E-mail me about it or contact me on AIM on the s/n: Maajin Gohan .

We also need your help to keep DBGT.com up. So please click the banner on top of this post. If for some reason you can't see the banner and just a black space. Please just click that. This will help us alot. Thx everyone / More To Come / MG Out...

Video Clips Down & Fanart
2002'11'18 ++ posted by JamJar
We have quite an un-reliable host for out video clips which keeps moveing things arround and changing things, they're server's uptime is like 2%. I won't mention the name of this host, however I have decided to stop using them. I will upload about 250 Mb Of Media Clips on my server soon, hopefully I will be able to do this by the end of the week If i'm not too busy. For some time now, I have been thinking about opening up a fan-art section on the gallery; for registered users, where people can add the url's to their own fan-art. Please tell me what you think about this by e-mailing me. This would also be a great way for people to critisize, and help other people's work.

SITE INFORMATION

Site Layout Revision: 10/19/02

Live Stats: 1 user online

NEWS TICKER
Site News: Site upgrades are currently being processed, and can be viewable as progressions are made. Image Gallery is now undergoing constructions, and image additions are being made. Multimedia is on its way, and new information and game reviews are being processed as well.
DB News: PS2 video game information is being scattered among DBZ web sites, and an official trailer has been released. New DBZ series episodes are being aired. More information is soon to come.
Majin Gohan is literally working all the time for you, the DBGT fans. He works on everything the staff dishes to him plus projects of his own. So make sure you visit DBGT often for his updates.
